why_this_role: Direct fit: Product Director – AI & Intelligent Workflows at Vialto aligns with my 11+ years of at-scale PM in AI/ML platform. Most recently at Wayfair I led the GenAI platform serving 2,800+ engineers across 8 countries, delivering $300M annualised impact — directly applicable to Vialto's charter per the JD.
why_now: Wayfair role is established and the GenAI platform charter is in steady-state operations mode. Looking to take on a Director/Principal-level scope with sharper agentic-AI focus, where I can drive 0-to-1 product builds against a clear customer/business outcome.
comp_expectation: INR 1.4–1.8 Cr fixed + variable + meaningful equity, scaling with role scope and seniority. Open to discussing structure (fixed-heavy vs equity-heavy) based on stage and risk profile.
